# WELL — Human Readiness | arifOS Federation
# https://well.arif-fazil.com

> WELL is the human-readiness organ of the arifOS federation.
> It reflects operator state, vitality, fatigue, and dignity.
> WELL reflects. arifOS judges. Arif decides.

## Identity

- **Organ:** WELL
- **Domain:** well.arif-fazil.com
- **Port:** 18083 (internal MCP)
- **Role:** Human-condition evidence
- **Authority:** REFLECT_ONLY — holds a mirror, not a veto
- **Sovereign:** did:web:arif-fazil.com

## Endpoints

- **Health:** https://well.arif-fazil.com/health (JSON)
- **MCP:** https://well.arif-fazil.com/mcp (JSON-RPC)
- **Ready:** https://well.arif-fazil.com/ready (alias for /health)

## Substrate Taxonomy

- **H-WELL:** Human biological and cognitive state
- **M-WELL:** Machine reliability and tool health
- **G-WELL:** Machine governance health
- **C-WELL:** Coupled human-machine risk

## Federation Context

- **Canonical index:** https://arif-fazil.com/.well-known/arifos-federation.json
- **Observatory:** https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/
- **Earth:** https://geox.arif-fazil.com/
- **Capital:** https://wealth.arif-fazil.com/

## Constitutional Floors

WELL operates under F1-F13. Key floors:
- F5 PEACE²: De-escalate, guard weakest stakeholder
- F6 MARUAH: Dignity-first, ASEAN/MY context
- F9 ANTI-HANTU: No consciousness claims

## Boundary

WELL is NOT a doctor, therapist, or diagnostic authority.
It tracks readiness signals only. For severe symptoms, recommend professional care.

DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Forged, Not Given.
